step_rationale: PLA2-derived inflammatory lipid mediators activating immune cells and driving plaque disruption.
mechanism: Lysophospholipids are potent inflammatory mediators generated by phospholipase A2 that recruit leukocytes, activate platelets, and destabilize plaques.
